name: DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABB11_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABB12_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm; WITH raw AS ( SELECT dbo.trim_default(Provider_Identifier) AS Provider_Identifier, dbo.trim_default(Provider_Address_Identifier) AS Provider_Address_Identifier, dbo.trim_default(Language_Description) AS Lang_Desc_Raw FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABB10_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm ), lang_split AS ( SELECT r.Provider_Identifier, r.Provider_Address_Identifier, s.value AS LvLang, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.Provider_Identifier + r.Provider_Address_Identifier ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS LvLangSeqNo FROM raw r CROSS APPLY string_split(r.Lang_Desc_Raw, ',') s ) SELECT r.Provider_Identifier + r.Provider_Address_Identifier + ';' + CAST(l.LvLangSeqNo as varchar(10)) + ';' + '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, '@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp}' AS FIRST_RECYC_TS, 0 AS CMN_PRCT_LANG_SK, r.Provider_Identifier + r.Provider_Address_Identifier AS CMN_PRCT_ID, l.LvLangSeqNo AS LANG_SEQ_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK, dbo.trim_default(UPPER(l.LvLang)) AS LANG_DESC, 'FACETS' AS CMN_PRCT_LKP_SRC_SYS_CD_FACETS, 'DOMINION' AS CMN_PRCT_LKP_SRC_SYS_CD_VCAC INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABB11_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm FROM lang_split l JOIN raw r ON r.Provider_Identifier = l.Provider_Identifier AND r.Provider_Address_Identifier = l.Provider_Address_Identifier; SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK, r.Provider_Identifier + r.Provider_Address_Identifier AS CMN_PRCT_ID, l.LvLangSeqNo AS LANG_SEQ_NO INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABB12_TMP_DominionIdsCmnPrctLangXfrm FROM lang_split l JOIN raw r ON r.Provider_Identifier = l.Provider_Identifier AND r.Provider_Address_Identifier = l.Provider_Address_Identifier;
